notes:
v0.1.5 makes Voquence easier to live in.

• HUD pill now shows the active mode. "CLEAN TEXT", "FOUNDER MODE", "POETRY / BARS" instead of generic "RECORDING". No more "wait, what mode am I in?" moments.
• New mode: Poetry / Bars. Turn any voice note into 4-8 rap bars with internal rhyme, or a short free verse for reflective moments.
• Mode picker reorganized into three groups: Productivity, Professional, Creative.

Auto-update should pull this within a few hours. If your existing hotkey was changed in Settings, it's preserved.
